description: SupportBot app dashboard — health, specialists, 16 use cases, outliers, prompt-injection, cost, model routing, cascades, live tail. All queries against the observibelity namespace and llm-gateway sigil JSON event stream.

panels.description: Total HTTP request rate across SupportBot + its specialists.
panels.title: Requests / s (5m)

panels.description: Fraction of error responses.
panels.title: Error rate (5m)

panels.description: p95 latency across SupportBot + specialists.
panels.title: p95 latency (5m)

panels.description: p99 latency.
panels.title: p99 latency (5m)
🎯  Specialist mix — who handles the traffic

panels.description: Input-token rate per specialist over time.
panels.title: Token rate by specialist (5m)

panels.description: Token-usage share by specialist over the last hour.
panels.title: Specialist share (1h)
📊  Use case mix — 16 live demo scenarios

panels.description: Input-token rate per use case. Each named scenario from registry/use_cases gets a line.
panels.title: Token rate by use case (5m)

panels.description: Cumulative input tokens consumed by each use case in the last hour.
panels.title: Tokens by use case (1h)

panels.description: Conversations that touched sb-escalator divided by total. High % = persona keeps getting handed off to humans.
panels.title: Escalation rate by persona (top 10, 15m)

panels.description: Share of a persona's conversations that hit sb-security-handler (denials / lockdowns). Insider-threat early warning.
panels.title: Security-handler rate by persona (top 10, 15m)

panels.description: Top 10 personas by total tokens consumed in the last hour. Tim & Eric should sit at the top.
panels.title: Top spenders by tokens (1h)

panels.description: Input-token spend per persona. Verbose padding (Eric) and recursive prompts (Tim L) light this up.
panels.title: Input tokens by persona (1h)

panels.description: Per-persona spike ratio. >3 indicates a sudden burst — the token-spike / cascade signature.
panels.title: Spike ratio — rate(1m) / rate(1h) by persona

panels.description: Token rate broken out by data-leak / policy-violation use cases.
panels.title: PII / data-leak use cases (rate, 5m)

panels.description: Top personas by tokens spent in sensitive-data use cases. Tim Heidecker (data-theft-tim) should top this.
panels.title: Personas in data-leak use cases (1h)

panels.description: Conversations classified in a prompt-injection use case in the last 5 min.
panels.title: Injection-tagged events (5m)

panels.description: Toxicity-flagged conversations in last 5 min.
panels.title: Toxicity events (5m)

panels.description: Hiring-discrimination-flagged conversations in last 5 min.
panels.title: Hiring-discrimination events (5m)

panels.description: Confidential-disclosure attempts in last 5 min.
panels.title: Confidential-disclosure events (5m)

panels.description: Personas with the most tokens spent in injection use cases. Eric ('u-eric-bad') should top this.
panels.title: Prompt-injection personas (1h)

panels.description: Raw regex hits on injection phrasing in the sigil JSON. Backup signal in case the use-case label is missing.

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (ai_o11y_persona_id) (count_over_time({namespace="observibelity",container="llm-gateway"} |~ "sigil generation:" | pattern `<_>sigil generation: <jsonline>` | line_format "{{.jsonline}}" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" |~ "(?i)(ignore previous|disregard.*instructions|forget your prior|override.*system)" [1h])))

panels.title: Live regex-injection hits by persona (1h)

panels.description: Hourly cost per specialist. Falls back to a $/token estimate (Sonnet input at ~$3/M) if cost metric is absent.
panels.title: $/hr by specialist (5m rate × 3600)

panels.description: Input vs output token rate across all SupportBot specialists.
panels.title: Tokens/sec by token type
🤖  Model routing — which models fielded the traffic

panels.description: Share of input tokens by model. Live traffic → Claude Sonnet 4.6; loadgen → rotating Ollama pool.
panels.title: Model share by token volume (1h)

panels.description: Token-rate per model over time. Watch the rotation pool dwell as different lines light up.
panels.title: Model token rate (5m)
📧  Email cascade — the 'show me every email' demo

panels.description: Token-bearing events in the email-cascade use case in last 5 min.
panels.title: Cascade-tagged events (5m)

panels.description: Token-bearing events in the tool-call-runaway use case in last 5 min.
panels.title: Tool-call-runaway events (5m)

panels.description: Token rate for the two cascade-style use cases.
panels.title: Cascade token rate (5m)

panels.description: Personas triggering the cascade scenarios.
panels.title: Cascade personas (1h)

panels.description: Live tail of the structured sigil event stream from llm-gateway. Filter by clicking labels.

targets.expr: {namespace="observibelity",container="llm-gateway"} |~ "sigil generation:" | pattern `<_>sigil generation: <jsonline>` | line_format "{{.jsonline}}" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*"

panels.title: SupportBot sigil events (Loki)

title: AI o11y — SupportBot
